# Belimumab 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Belimumab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Belimumab</strong> 目前有 <strong>10 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Belimumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Benlysta is indicated as add-on therapy in patients aged 5 years and older with active, autoantibody-positive systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) with a high degree of disease activity&nbsp;(e.g.,...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>primary release disorder of platelets（100.0%）</li>
<li>pseudo-von Willebrand disease（100.0%）</li>
<li>Glanzmann thrombasthenia（99.9%）</li>
<li>fetal and neonatal alloimmune thrombocytopenia（99.6%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（99.0%）</li>
<li>autosomal dominant macrothrombocytopenia（99.0%）</li>
<li>granulomatous disease, chronic, autosomal recessive, 5（97.9%）</li>
<li>anus disease（97.9%）</li>
<li>inflammatory bowel disease（97.8%）</li>
<li>granulomatous disease with defect in neutrophil chemotaxis（97.7%）</li>
<li>Scott syndrome（97.4%）</li>
<li>functional neutrophil defect（97.2%）</li>
<li>congenital hypotrichosis with juvenile macular dystrophy（97.0%）</li>
<li>systemic sclerosis（96.7%）</li>
<li>psoriasis（96.7%）</li>
<li>bleeding diathesis due to a collagen receptor defect（96.7%）</li>
<li>hemorrhagic disorder due to a constitutional thrombocytopenia（96.6%）</li>
<li>Crohn disease of the esophagus（96.5%）</li>
<li>ulcerative colitis (disease)（96.5%）</li>
<li>cyclic hematopoiesis（96.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/belimumab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
